items.alt: Duck breast, potato pavé, parsnip purée, herb oil, ancho aioli in foreground, grilled octopus and grapefruit in background
Short rib ragu and papperdelle, garnished with tarragon, plated atop dinner menu with wine glass in the top left
Ravioli in sage brown butter sauce, garnished with fresh sage and grated parmesan, plated atop dinner menu with wine glass in the top left
Duck ragu with gnocchi and grated parmesan, side salad of arugula and cherry tomatoes
Playing saxophone into a microphone in lavendar jacket
Lamb chops resting on romanesco sauce and parsnip purée on the left, miso black cod garnished with lightly fried wonton triangles and pea sprouts on the right
Soy and garlic sauted broccolini on the left, deep-fried tofu garnished with pea sprouts and green onion on the right
Playing sax into a microphone in gold and green ginko cardigan, backlit by red overhead lights
Hamachi loin crudo, garnished with pickled pepper slices, burnt lemon slices and sprouts
Lamb chops resting on yogurt sauce with a side of duck fat roasted potatoes, garnished with chopped parsley
Grainy photo of stage show on raised platform backed with beer kegs. Band is wearing black suits
Pasta dressed in pesto sauce and grated parmesan, and baked lobster tail on top
Pita bread to the left, hummus dressed with olive oil, sumac and pea sprouts on the top right, and baba ganoush with pomegranate seeds on the bottom right
Playing on a grand piano, wearing a lavendar jacket
